heading: process
body:
Atlas Functions support the following `process` APIs:

- [hrTime](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/process.html#process_process_hrtime_time)

- [nextTick](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/process.html#process_process_nexttick_callback_args)

- [version](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/process.html#process_process_version)

- [versions](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/process.html#process_process_versions)
